Headline: #21 Cermak Temporary Westbound Reroute near 25th/Michigan
ShortDescription: Westbound 21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, Michigan, 31st, King Dr. and over normal route: due to police activity near 25th/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #21 Cermak buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, Michigan, 31st, King Dr. and over normal route: due to police activity near 25th/Michigan.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute near Indiana/41st
ShortDescription: 39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Indiana/41st.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Indiana/41st.

Westbound buses will operate via Pershing, Prairie, State and Pershing, then resume their normal route.

Eastbound buses will operate via Pershing, Michigan, 41st, Prairie and Pershing, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
